title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RB911G-2HPnD-12S, mANTBox 2 12s
description: Thanks to the implementation of the RB911 into the existing mANT type sector antenna, a new transmitting unit designed for ISP providers was created, ideal for connecting clients over longer distances Inside the sector antenna is a very powerful RB911G-2HPnD with 600MHz clock, 64MB operating memory, L4 license, 1Ã GLAN and supporting WiFi standards 802.11b/g/n for transmission speed up to 300 Mbps The sector antenna from the mANT series works in the 2.4GHz band (2412 - 2484 MHz) with a gain of 12 dBi , a radiation angle of 120° and stands out for its high-quality workshop processing. Thanks to the high-quality workshop processing, the antenna has a great front-to-back ratio with the help of the rear shielding cover and the bronze-plated chassis from the inside back Antenna Holder Power adapter 24 V/0.8 A Gigabit PoE injector Metal belt
specsSearch: Wireless features Tx power [dBm] 30 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 120 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Antenna gain [dBi] 12 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 10 .. 28V DC Power type DC connector, PoE PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 11 Power via connector/terminal 8 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Design Outdoor Width [mm] 140 Height [mm] 348 Depth [mm] 82 Hardware CPU AR9342 CPU frequency [MHz] 600 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 128 RAM [MB] 64
